title: Update Meshtastic compatibility docs for Position support
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.7 implemented Meshtastic POSITION_APP local-client location ingestion, but docs/meshtastic-compat-dev.md still describes Position as unsupported/deferred. What needs to be done: update the compatibility documentation to describe the implemented local-client Position behavior, test coverage, and remaining metadata/epoch limitations tracked in project-LICHEN-zte2.7.1.
